title: hymenolyma scariosum
intro: Hymenolyma scariosum is a plant species, also known as the 'Scabious', which belongs to the family Boraginaceae and is native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Hymenolyma scariosum include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Hymenolyma scariosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
